implementation_summary: Added explicit analyst draft proof-boundary contract entries for S033, S034 and S035.
Wired S034/S035 step surfaces with machine-readable proof placement, audit posture, client-safe payload posture and blocked-overclaim attributes.
Added negative UI tests proving S034/S035 do not claim advisor approval, compliance release, export readiness or client visibility.
Kept proof concise as summary strips/audit strips instead of expanding page length.

screenshot_proof.reason: No visual layout change was required for this slice; the change is contract and DOM proof-boundary wiring. EPIC-09-IMPL-01B screenshots remain the visual proof for the compact S034/S035 surfaces.
